scene: Doodle-Einstein slumped at a patent-office desk stamping a huge pile of paperwork, a wall calendar reading 1905, big black caps 1905. (Doodle-Einstein is a crude stick figure with a round white head, wild messy white hair sticking out, a bushy white mustache, dot eyes, thin line body.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A thesis paper with a big red REJECTED stamp beside the young clerk, big black caps REJECTED. (Doodle-Einstein is a crude stick figure with a round white head, wild messy white hair sticking out, a bushy white mustache, dot eyes, thin line body.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Doodle-Einstein casually scribbling a glowing atom, a light beam, and a bending clock on scrap paper between stamps, big black caps IN HIS SPARE TIME. (Doodle-Einstein is a crude stick figure with a round white head, wild messy white hair sticking out, a bushy white mustache, dot eyes, thin line body.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
Huge glowing hand-lettered E=mc2 filling the frame, big black caps ONE MAN. ONE YEAR. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Stan in the present shrugging beside a big red question mark, big black caps WHY DOES NOBODY DO THAT NOW? (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
